narrative:
Hale Township has 922 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
